steps.instruction: **Updated** This protocol has been updated based on feedback from the user. This protocol is part two of a larger workflow. The entire workflow can be found below Part 1: [Small Molecule Library Prep](./1adec6) Part 2: [Seed Cells](./1adec6-2) Part 3: [Transfer Small Molecules](./1adec6-3) Part 4: [Transfer Small Molecules - CSV Input](./1adec6-4) Part 5: [Custom Supernatant Removal](./1adec6-5) Part 6: [ProcartaPlex Protocol-1](./1adec6-6) Part 7: [ProcartaPlex Protocol-2](./1adec6-7) In this protocol, 250µL of cells are transferred from the [NEST 12-Well Reservoir, 15mL](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/verified-labware/products/nest-12-well-reservoir-15-ml) to the SPL 96-Well Cell Culture Plates. Explanation of complex parameters below: * **P300-Multi Mount**: Select which mount the P300-Multi Pipette is attached to. * **Number of Destination Plates**: Select the number of destination plates. ---
P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will pick up tips.
P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will mix Cells in **Column 3** of NEST 12-Well Reservoir, 15mL.
P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will transfer 250µL of Cells from NEST 12-Well Reservoir, 15mL to Columns 1-6 of the first Destination Plate (Slot 1).
P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will drop used tips in the waste bin.
P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will pick up tips.
P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will mix Cells in **Column 4** of NEST 12-Well Reservoir, 15mL.
P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will transfer 250µL of Cells from NEST 12-Well Reservoir, 15mL to Columns 7-12 of the first Destination Plate (Slot 1).
P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will drop used tips in the waste bin.
Steps 1-8 will repeat for each additional destination plate, accessing the following two channels of the reservoir for each plate.
